summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of new Obras Catálogo and Blog Artículos view toggle (grid/list) and dnd-kit drag-reorder behaviour. All scenarios passed including default views, view toggle, drag-reorder in both views, order persistence across view toggles, click-without-drag does not reorder, filter+reorder with hidden items preserved, and regression flows (add, search, empty state, navigation).

test_results.obras_view_toggle_to_list: PASS - obras-list shown, obras-grid removed; rows include thumbnail, title, status, materials, work-row-edit-<id>, work-row-view-<id>, work-drag-<id>
test_results.obras_drag_grid: PASS - dragging work-drag-w1 over w3 reordered ['w1','w2','w3',...] -> ['w2','w3','w1',...]
test_results.obras_order_persistence_grid_to_list: PASS - same order in list view after grid drag
test_results.obras_click_handle_no_movement: PASS - plain click on work-drag did not reorder
test_results.obras_drag_list: PASS - dragging first row onto a later row reordered list rows
test_results.obras_regression_filter_empty_state: PASS - obras-empty-state appears with non-matching search
test_results.blog_view_toggle_default_list: PASS - blog-table visible, blog-grid absent (default list)
test_results.blog_drag_list: PASS - drag in <tr> rows reorders articles
test_results.blog_drag_grid: PASS - drag in cards reorders articles
test_results.blog_filter_reorder_publicados: PASS - reordered two published articles; switching back to Todos kept all 4 articles, no duplicates and draft article preserved
test_results.blog_regression_search: PASS - 'No hay artículos' empty message on non-matching search

critical_code_review_comments: Both Catalogo.tsx (~336 LOC) and Articulos.tsx (~395 LOC) keep three concerns inline (sortable card, sortable row, page). Consider extracting SortableWorkRow/SortableWorkCard and ArticleRow/ArticleCard into /components/obras and /components/blog respectively for readability and reuse, mirroring the existing WorkCard component.
Drag handle in Articulos.tsx grid card sits at top-3 right-3 same coordinates as the Status badge could feel close on small cards; not a bug, just a polish note.
ViewToggle is well-typed and reused — good. Strategy switches between rectSortingStrategy and verticalListSortingStrategy correctly per view.
reorderWithinFiltered correctly preserves out-of-view items; verified empirically by filter+reorder test (Todos count unchanged after dragging within Publicados subset).
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing Zustand seed (8 works w1-w8, 4 articles art-1..art-4).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Obras/Blog grid+list+dnd-kit drag-reorder feature is fully working. dnd-kit PointerSensor activation distance is 5px; tests used mouse.down -> 15 incremental mouse.moves -> mouse.up. State resets on full page reload (in-memory Zustand) which is expected. Useful testids: obras-view-toggle/-grid/-list, obras-grid, obras-list, work-card-<id>, work-row-<id>, work-row-edit-<id>, work-row-view-<id>, work-drag-<id>; blog-view-toggle/-grid/-list, blog-table, blog-grid, article-row-<id>, article-card-<id>, article-drag-<id>, article-edit/-delete-<id>, article-card-edit/-delete-<id>.
